customer_vision: Southridge CEO committed to board that D365 will be live for fiscal year close in March 2028. This is non-negotiable. CFO is the day-to-day sponsor and is very hands-on.
business_objectives: Go-live on D365 F&O by March 2028 for fiscal year close
Achieve real-time financial visibility across 12 subsidiaries
success_criteria: Parallel run: D365 and PeopleSoft for Q1 2028 close
Clean data migration validated by external auditor
risks: Complex media rights revenue recognition requirements may require ISV
pitfalls: Client attempted D365 F&O once before with a different SI — project was cancelled after 8 months
Finance team is resistant to change — heavy change management needed
key_decisions: Custom media rights module to be built on D365 extensibility framework
Phase 1: Finance only; Phase 2: SCM; Phase 3: Media Rights
delivery_notes: Day 1 priority: run design workshops with CFO (Patricia Lim) before any configuration. Previous SI failure was caused by skipping design. Change management is critical — budget has been allocated.
